description_text: Kjjeep: Cars & Motorcycles' Paradise Item description Feature: Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Adhesive installation with some drilling by bodyshop, is easy to apply for most cars. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Specification: Material:ABS Plastic Size:66 x 13.5cm Color:Carbon Fiber Universal fit for vehicles Package Included: 1 x Car Rear Bumper Spoiler cover 1 x Double Sided Tape set of screw Product overview
